item.title: The Dark Secrets Behind Brittney Wood's Disappearance
item.description: Brittney Wood, 19, disappeared in Alabama in May 2012 shortly after her uncle Donephan Wood was arrested on charges involving multiple family members. Investigators named her a victim. Her remains were never recovered and no one has been charged in her disappearance.

media:content.media:title: The Dark Secrets Behind Brittney Wood's Disappearance
media:content.media:description: Brittney Wood, 19, disappeared in Alabama in May 2012 shortly after her uncle Donephan Wood was arrested on charges involving multiple family members. Investigators named her a victim. Her remains were never recovered and no one has been charged in her disappearance.
